headline: Is Exxon Mobil (XOM) Still Attractive After Strong Five-Year Share Price Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Exxon Mobil's current share price reflects its true value, you are not alone. This article will help you frame that question clearly. Exxon Mobil's stock last closed at US$151.58, with returns of 1.2% over 7 days, 0.2% over 30 days, 23.6% year to date, 43.7% over 1 year, 65.2% over 3 years, and 209.2% over 5 years. Recent headlines have focused on Exxon Mobil's capital allocation choices, large scale investment plans, and how the company is positioning itself...

headline: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) Targets 13% Earnings Growth Through 2030
summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) ranks among the 14 safe stocks to buy now for a starter stock portfolio. Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) presented its financial outlook at the Morgan Stanley Energy & Power Conference 2026 on March 3, revealing objectives for long-term growth. The company expects a 13% compound annual growth rate in earnings through […]
